metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4865
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 3,5,6: pre- and post-embedding immunogold of cerebellar Purkinje cells showed GαO (GNAO1) was localized to postsynapses (mostly membrane, when PSD localized at its edges, some cytoplasmic) and to a lesser extend presynapses (mostly membrane, some cytoplasmic).

Overall, the synaptic location of Gαo represented a small proportion compared to that located along the extrasynaptic plasma membrane and cytoplasmic sites. Authors note that this coincides with previous reporting on GABAb receptor localization, and showed that Gαo and GABAB1 were observed at PSDs of excitatory synapses and extrasynaptic sites between PC spines (s) and parallel fibers (pf), many times very close to each other.. Experimental description: M&M: "Four adult male C57BL/6J mice obtained from Charles River Laboratories"

antibody:
rabbit anti-Gαo polyclonal (ref#ab154001; Recombinant fragment corresponding to Human GNAO1 aa 104-338; Abcam, Cambridge, United Kingdom)

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
